response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning with the primary stack. They also have a diverse skill set and experience with various technologies and programming languages.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Proven ability to work on complex projects and contribute to architecture decisions
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js, a key technology in the primary stack
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java, listed as secondary technologies
Some experience is in different industries and not directly related to internal automation tooling
